name: ZeroTier
description: Monitor ZeroTier software-defined networking for secure network access and device compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ZeroTier Central at https://my.zerotier.com
2. Go to Account → API Access Tokens
3. Generate a new token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in ZeroTier Central → Account → API Tokens

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists ZeroTier networks for secure network infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews ZeroTier network members to audit private network access
